death.attack.trvirtuoso.death_aura.sourc: %1$s was disintegrated by %2$s's Death Aura using %3$
death.attack.trvirtuoso.dimensional_blad: %1$s was cut across dimensions by %2$s wielding %3$s
%1$s was cut across dimensions using %2$s's technique
%1$s was cut across dimensions by %2$s's technique using %3$
death.attack.trvirtuoso.horme_blade.item: %1$s was sliced perfectly whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.horme_blade.sour: %1$s was sliced perfectly by %2$s's technique using %3$
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mercy: %1$s was given a merciful death whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mercy.item: %1$s was given a merciful death whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mercy.player: %1$s was given a merciful death whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mercy.source: %1$s was given a merciful death by %2$s's technique
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mercy.source.ite: %1$s was given a merciful death by %2$s's technique using %3$
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mystic_cube: %1$s was forced into the dark by %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mystic_cube.item: %1$s was forced into the dark by %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mystic_cube.play: %1$s was forced into the dark by %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.mystic_cube.sour: %1$s was forced into the dark using %2$s's technique
%1$s was forced into the dark by %2$s's technique using %3$

death.attack.trvirtuoso.spin.item: %1$s was spun to death whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.spin.player: %1$s was spun to death whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.spin.source: %1$s was spun to death by %2$s's technique
death.attack.trvirtuoso.spin.source.item: %1$s was spun to death by %2$s's technique using %3$
death.attack.trvirtuoso.tusk: %1$s was spun infinitely to death whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.trvirtuoso.tusk.item: %1$s was spun infinitely to death whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s

death.attack.trvirtuoso.tusk.source: %1$s was spun infinitely to death by %2$s's technique

enchantment.trvirtuoso.loyal_shine.desc: Deal Holy Flame type damage, also inflicting Holy Burn on the opponent
gamerule.enableClothoSkillDeletion.descr: Gamerule dictating whether or not clotho can permanently delete skills with Alexandria.
gamerule.enableCompleteUltimateList.desc: Gamerule dictating whether or not clotho can make ultimates temporarily.
gamerule.enableEgo.description: Gamerule from trvirtuoso (for now) determining whether skills can develop egos.
gamerule.enableEgoNaming.description: Gamerule from trvirtuoso(for now) determining whether skills with egos can be named and evolve into manas.
gamerule.enableKingAndGodUlts.descriptio: Gamerule for whether King and God class ultimates in Virtuoso are obtainable.
gamerule.enableSingleUltOwner.descriptio: Virtuoso gamerule for whether designated ultimates can have more than one owner.
gamerule.enableUltObtainment.description: Gamerule determining whether ultimates can be obtained naturally from the trvirtuoso addon.
gamerule.enableUltimateCopying.descripti: Gamerule from trvirtuoso determining whether an ultimate from trvirtuoso can perm copy an ultimate.
gamerule.enableUniqueCopying.description: Gamerule determining whether a unique skill from trvirtuoso can copy other uniques (only applies to unfair).
gamerule.enableWaylandBuffJanus.descript: Gamerule in control of if having wayland gives janus full access to all uniques.
trvirtuoso.advancements.akashic_record.d: Eat the entire record of the world's laws!
Eat a piece of the world's laws.
trvirtuoso.advancements.gazed.descriptio: The abyss stares back into you...
trvirtuoso.advancements.gazed.title: When you stare into the abyss...
trvirtuoso.apathy.effect: The world does not affect you.
trvirtuoso.arawn.execute: This target is extremely guilty, execute with prejudice.
trvirtuoso.arawn.invalid: This target is not valid for judgement.
trvirtuoso.arawn.valid: The number of conditions fulfilled is: %s
trvirtuoso.arawn.victim: You have been judged GUILTY, Prepare for Execution.
trvirtuoso.clotho.alexandria.failure: Clotho is incapable of removing records from that being due to this world's limitations.
trvirtuoso.janus.lack: You lack the necessary analysis capabilities for this task.
trvirtuoso.manas.0.3_4: I sense success in the distance
trvirtuoso.manas.0.6_2: §7Life is our domain to do with
trvirtuoso.manas.0.6_3: §7Whatever path is taken, I shall be there
trvirtuoso.manas.0.death: §7It may have been inevitable, but i still wanted to delay it...
trvirtuoso.manas.0.respawn: §7Revenge is a want, not a need, but I dearly want it.
trvirtuoso.manas.1.5_3: This mortal coil is feeble, but it shall do
trvirtuoso.manas.1.death: §4Your weakness offends me, yet your pain disturbs me...
trvirtuoso.manas.1.dodge: I shall assist, just this once
trvirtuoso.manas.1.respawn: §4Hmpf.. You would not be my master if you could not come back from death
trvirtuoso.manas.2.5_1: Victory is ours for the taking
trvirtuoso.manas.2.6_1: §eDon't do good for profit, do it for fun
trvirtuoso.manas.2.6_2: §eMan, this skill stuff feels kinda limiting
trvirtuoso.manas.2.death: §eWelp, that ain't good, it was nice knowin' ya.
trvirtuoso.manas.2.respawn: §eWasn't that a toughy, at least we got back alive
trvirtuoso.manas.9.6_1: §9『NOTICE: Proceed with caution, opponent may be strong』
trvirtuoso.manas.9.death: §9「I... I'm sorry... I-I-I couldn't save you...」
trvirtuoso.manas.9.respawn: §9「Don't leave again. I'll help you as much as I can just so you don't die again」
trvirtuoso.race.apostle.notes: A follower of an altered form of Jedidiah's teachings, leading to a more vampiric alteration to their own bodies
trvirtuoso.race.commander.notes: The general has finally become a commander of their own army, standing out resoundingly enough to gain a skill for their efforts
trvirtuoso.race.contractor.notes: A wanderer who takes paying jobs
trvirtuoso.race.crusader.notes: A squire who has properly become a knight and gone on to join holy battles
trvirtuoso.race.disciple.notes: A deep follower of the teachings of Jedidiah, finally having grown past the need for self-centered growth
trvirtuoso.race.emperor.notes: FINALLY, the PEAK of humanity, the TRUE potential of otherworldly descendants
trvirtuoso.race.enforcer.notes: The mages obligated by the world itself to indiscriminately kill threats
trvirtuoso.race.general.notes: It seems that the paladin is gaining power in more ways than one, quite political
trvirtuoso.race.hermit.notes: A truly solitary race focused entirely on their own growth and development, do not disturb them
trvirtuoso.race.jedidiah.notes: A race of wise humanoids who once followed the universe's greatest holy mage, Jedidiah
trvirtuoso.race.myrddin.notes: A powerful race of mages, who have reached the top, unbound by the world, yet still drawn to it.
trvirtuoso.race.paladin.notes: A crusader of great renown, having gone through many battles and come out on top
trvirtuoso.race.scholar.notes: A human adjacent race oriented towards magic, descending from the mages Merlin and Solomon
trvirtuoso.race.sorcerer.notes: A hermit who has properly established themself and their workshop
trvirtuoso.race.squire.notes: The otherworlder descendants that take up shop with the holy knights
trvirtuoso.race.trickster.notes: Mages of Fae descent, they love to make deals, but are often tricked by the world itself into making a deal
trvirtuoso.race.triumvirate.notes: Hmm, have you finally reached your peak? I think not, keep going
trvirtuoso.race.wanderer.notes: A race not for the faint of heart, tend to be solitary but are open to making contractual deals
trvirtuoso.skill.acedia.description: Acedia, Lord of Apathy. Nothing happens on his side of the wall, nothing happens on the other, evidence points to nothing happening in between either.
trvirtuoso.skill.apathy.description: you cannot bring yourself to care, and if you do not care, why should it affect you?
trvirtuoso.skill.arawn.description: The Lord of Punishment and Annwn... Your strength scales based on teh crimes of the opponent.
trvirtuoso.skill.atropos.description: Everything ends someday, even time itself shall come to an end to... You alone have the eye that sees it... the blade that cuts the string of fate...
trvirtuoso.skill.avalon.description: Blessed by the Fae, you often avoid getting hit by attacks
trvirtuoso.skill.beacon.description: A combination of the Light spell and the Formhide battlewill, glow brightly to draw enemies.
trvirtuoso.skill.clotho.description: Where once was, will always be. For if it existed, there was a record, and if there is a record, then exist it shall continue to do.
trvirtuoso.skill.coeus.description: You have wandered the world seeking all there is to wonder about, you have managed to understand but a fraction of it, but you have learned so much, isn't it wonderful?
trvirtuoso.skill.compress.description: A combination of the Shrink spell and Diamond Path battlewill, Compress yourself down to a hard to hit siz, while retaining your armor and strength.
trvirtuoso.skill.concentrator.descriptio: Through rigorous study of the grimoire you discovered, you are now able to subconscious absorb surrounding magicules.
trvirtuoso.skill.dagdal.description: You cannot be moved, neither can anything you touch, but you can be stopped.
trvirtuoso.skill.dagdar.description: You cannot be stopped, neither can anything you touch, but you can be moved.
trvirtuoso.skill.daoloth.description: You are everywhere and nowhere, you are everyone and no one, you are infinite between voids, you are a singularity.
trvirtuoso.skill.davinci.description: The King of design, deconstruct and reconstruct the world at will, the world is your canvas. Turn skills into power and power into skills, turn entities into fuel for your domination and fuel back into tools.
trvirtuoso.skill.dimensional.description: A combination of the Horme skill and Heavy Slash battlewill, Your enemies will not escape it, not even across dimensions (Metaphorically).
trvirtuoso.skill.ending.description: All things have an end, and after mastering the power granted to you by your loneliness, you know exactly what those endings look like.
trvirtuoso.skill.ever_distant.descriptio: The optimized evolution of avalon, the unbeatable defense
trvirtuoso.skill.faerune.description: As a recently awakened embodiment of the §kfae §rand their twisted logic, you pay deep attention to law. Which law is anyone's guess.
trvirtuoso.skill.faerune.not_yours: Teehee! You failed! no stealing from the fae!
trvirtuoso.skill.glorious.description: You shan't take severing damage, and forever will you heal.
trvirtuoso.skill.goibniu.description: Goibniu, King of Synergy. Everything works better together, the body and the soul, magicules and aura, the chains in chainmail.
trvirtuoso.skill.hadraniel.description: It seems even God himself has chosen to let you continue your proclivities. Go on, take their souls, can't you hear them begging?
trvirtuoso.skill.hamiel.description: Your journey for glory is over... You have succeeded. While all that you hurt, only receives half, so shall you.
trvirtuoso.skill.handler.description: You seem to have awakened a tinker skill for your efforts in engineering and technology, handler hmm? I wonder what you can optimize.
trvirtuoso.skill.haniel.description: The Great Archangel of health blesses you with energy, you may not be able to fight, but you shall take no damage regardless.
trvirtuoso.skill.horme.description: Your continuous efforts have paid off, young Grecian, now go off and work your magic.
trvirtuoso.skill.ideal.description: After refining your craft for so long, you have finally reached an ideal, your attacks will always land.
trvirtuoso.skill.izanagi.description: Lord of Exorcism, Your soul is intertwined in your every action, you know how souls function better than anyone, you know how spirits live and breath, you are their downfall. You are the purifier
trvirtuoso.skill.janus.description: The Lord of Modulation and Modification, taking things apart and putting them together, to reconfigure them, analysis is required for full use
trvirtuoso.skill.jeremiel.description: You may have been dealt a life without mercy, but that does not mean others have to as well, spread joy, and maybe, you will come out better
trvirtuoso.skill.judas.description: You have betrayed one too many people, somehow you are still succeeding
trvirtuoso.skill.judge.description: A combination of the Arawn skill and Death March Dance battlewill, Set the scales of the jury into your favor, empower Annwn.
trvirtuoso.skill.lachesis.description: The journey never ends, never shall you falter, never shall you end... You shall weave fate itself to your whim... But after all this time, you have forgotten your beginnings too...
trvirtuoso.skill.lemegeton.description: The Book of Solomon, also called the Ars Goetia or Lesser Key Grimoire. I am sure you will succeed, now, §5STUDY.
trvirtuoso.skill.light_ping.description: A combination of the Light spell and Formhide battlewill obtained upon mastering Beacon, Set your enemies aglow for the world to see.
trvirtuoso.skill.limit.description: A Combination of the Space spell and the Diamond Path battleill, Slow down the attacks of your foes.
trvirtuoso.skill.lonely.description: You have reached the end of the path, oh how lonely and melancholic it leaves you, will you continue?
trvirtuoso.skill.luster.description: Such great energy and drive, such greatness, what will you do? All of these souls are begging to let you have them.
trvirtuoso.skill.merciful.description: You are sick of everyone needlessly killing the weak, you empower your allies and bring mercy to your enemies
trvirtuoso.skill.modifier.description: You seem to have awakened a tinker skill for your efforts in engineering and technology, modifier hmm? I wonder what you can make.
trvirtuoso.skill.morrigan.description: Combining the Strengths of both blessings and betrayal, war and death, Fate itself, you now hold absolute sovereignty
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_art.description: A combination of the {SPELL} spell and {BATTLEWILL} battlewill, {INSERT DESC HERE}.
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_aura.description: Combining Aura and Magic results in a mystic art... Not even the antithesis to skills can resist.
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_flame.descriptio: A combination of the HellFire spell and Ogre Flame battlewill, burn enemies to a crisp.
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_nullification.de: The nullification of attacks from sources combining aura and magic. (Creative Mode Only)
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_resistance.descr: The resistance of attacks from sources combining aura and magic, acquired by having both physical and magical attack resistances or nullifications
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_trap.description: A combination of the Shadow Bind spell and Roaring Lion Punch battlewill, put your enemies into a trap at a touch.
trvirtuoso.skill.mystic_water.descriptio: A combination of the Water Cutter spell and Aura Slash battlewill, Pierce their defenses.
trvirtuoso.skill.oberon.description: Life is a story, and you are the writer, history means nothing, because the future is now
trvirtuoso.skill.obscure.description: A combination of the Shrink spell and Haze battlewill, Hide from the scope of even more people, hard to see visibly, and hard to find physically.
trvirtuoso.skill.operator.description: You as operator dictate who gets skills, yourself included
trvirtuoso.skill.optimal_cook.descriptio: Cook after being optimized now has some more potent effects.
trvirtuoso.skill.optimal_guardian.descri: You have done your job as a mere knight for your people, now stand tall and defend your castle. As a wise man once said, 'My soldiers do not falter!'
trvirtuoso.skill.optimal_move.descriptio: An upgrade from the original instantaneous movement, now capable of moving in any direction, regardless of the ground under your feet, you make the air into ground at a higher aura cost
trvirtuoso.skill.optimal_regeneration.de: You have reached the pinnacle of your regeneration capabilities for now, any further and you will be reaching for Glory.
trvirtuoso.skill.optimal_susanoo.descrip: You have reached the pinnacle of Susano'o, even optimized it to deal even more permanent and powerful damage, bypassing all defenses.
trvirtuoso.skill.path.description: The path to everything starts with a single step, follow this path to victory, and see what awaits.
trvirtuoso.skill.pressurizer.description: You have reached the pinnacle of your concentration capabilities for now.
trvirtuoso.skill.punisher.description: §cTraitors.... §eSaviours.... §fWhat's the difference? Judgement shall be equal in the eyes of the world.
trvirtuoso.skill.pure_punch.description: A combination of the Saviour skill and Roaring Lion Punch battlewill, Purify the souls of your enemies with a punch.
trvirtuoso.skill.raziel.description: Raziel, Lord of Mystery. The gap in between atoms, the fundamental theory of everything that cannot be cracked, the explanation to everything.... all of them... fueled by Mystery.
trvirtuoso.skill.rend.description: A combination of the Swipe spell and Aura Sword battlewill, destroy their armor and pull them to you.
trvirtuoso.skill.robotnic.description: A skill specializing in reverse engineering and robotics. It seems an ego is budding.
trvirtuoso.skill.root.description: If it existed at any point in time... §0 There is Record of it...
trvirtuoso.skill.sathariel.description: Shatter their delusions, show them the truth, you are the snake, the trap. Your proclivities continue because God himself is gone.
trvirtuoso.skill.saviour.description: The hope of the people empowers you, and you shall empower them in turn.
trvirtuoso.skill.shade.description: A combination of the Darkness spell and Formhide battlewill, Blind your enemies.
trvirtuoso.skill.shelomoh.absolute: You are absolutely sure, but are you Ready?
trvirtuoso.skill.shelomoh.description: Shelomoh, Lord of Spells. If spells come from runes and formulas, surely they can be engineered to do whatever you want, regardless of who uses them.
trvirtuoso.skill.shelomoh.ready: You're ready? press the button oe more time.
trvirtuoso.skill.shelomoh.sure: You are sure, but are you absolutely sure?
trvirtuoso.skill.smelter.description: An easy to use Quality of Life skill to help you smelt your ores, with a low chance of doubling the items received.
trvirtuoso.skill.soul_shrine.description: Having devoured the energy of a powerful majin, you now take on some of its characteristics... Your punches hurt the soul...
trvirtuoso.skill.spatial_rend.descriptio: A combination of the Gravity Domination Skill and Rend Mystic Art, destroy their armor and pull them to you.
trvirtuoso.skill.spin.description: The art of spinning any object in a particular manner to deal damage, use it well.
trvirtuoso.skill.spiral_domination.descr: Complete domination and extreme boosting of spinning attacks.
trvirtuoso.skill.spiral_manipulation.des: The manipulation and boosting of Spinning attacks.
trvirtuoso.skill.spiral_nullification.de: The nullification of attacks from spinning sources
trvirtuoso.skill.spiral_resistance.descr: The resistance of attacks from spinning sources
trvirtuoso.skill.stripes.description: Your body can move or stop moving. Never both.
trvirtuoso.skill.suibhne.description: You couldn't make it stop. You are now cursed with insanity whenever you try to think. there is nothing left but insanity to dwell upon. §cMaster the skill, QUICK!
trvirtuoso.skill.tag.description: A combination of the teleport spell and Instant Move battlewill, Always right behind your enemies as they flee.
trvirtuoso.skill.thinker.description: You have the biggest brain on earth, it is too active, you cannot stop thinking. Make it stop. MAKE IT STOP. §cMAKE IT STOP!!!
trvirtuoso.skill.thunder_lance.descripti: A combination of the Lightning Lance spell and Heavy Slash battlewill, pierce through your enemies with greater ferver.
trvirtuoso.skill.traitor.description: The people may love the saviour, but you, you love yourself even more. Go on... §cbetray him.
trvirtuoso.skill.turing.description: Lord of Understanding, a skill presiding over the deconstruction and reverse engineering of the world. Despite its control over laws, it is still bound by them.
trvirtuoso.skill.tusk_1.description: Through your mastery of the spin, you have manifested a stand, you cannot summon it quite yet, but your nails spin now.
trvirtuoso.skill.tusk_2.description: Through enhancing your attacks, both physical and distanced, with mystic arts, your Skill has evolved further, capable of warping all attacks to the enemy
trvirtuoso.skill.tusk_3.description: After coming in contact with a divine being, you have been enlightened, your power growing to match, this is no easy feat.
trvirtuoso.skill.utopia.description: The Dreamed of Ideal of the fae, obtained after optimizing Ideal.
trvirtuoso.skill.wayland.description: Lord of Coordination, You control over the operation  of skills is paralleled by few. You are capable of both giving and taking skills, even altering them.
trvirtuoso.skill.wonder.description: Having found the spark of Wonder, you now look across the world to try and sate it.
trvirtuoso.skill.yehoda.description: You praise none but yourself... You have betrayed the saviour himself... Are you satisfied? You have thrown away betrayal for better means, yet you are still the same monster.
trvirtuoso.skill.yehoshua.description: Simple blessings are not enough, you have thrown away such a method for a new method, all for the same goal.
trvirtuoso.skill.yeshua.description: You have given out many a blessing, and seemingly received them as well. Pay heed and you may receive more than this
trvirtuoso.true.ether: True Spell: Ether has been obtained.
trvirtuoso.true.kaleidoscope: True Spell: Kaleidoscope has been obtained.
trvirtuoso.true.materialized: True Spell: Soul Materialization has been obtained.
trvirtuoso.ultimate.acquire.atropos: §eEnding §8succeeded in harvesting the lone power of the unsealed Blade of The End, reaching the end of the universe... §0Atropos, Lord of Endings
trvirtuoso.ultimate.acquire.clotho: §0Root §6has successfully harvested the records of §kAkasha §rand evolved into §5Clotho, Lord of Beginnings
trvirtuoso.ultimate.acquire.izanagi: §0 Soul Shrine §5 has successfully been exorcised and converted into §4 Izanagi, Lord of Exorcism.
trvirtuoso.ultimate.acquire.lachesis: §1Path §3has successfully collected enough data to continue moving forward, breaking past the barrier of unique into §9Lachesis, Lord of Continuation
trvirtuoso.ultimate.domain.cleave: §d You feel thin lines slowly forming on every surface in the domain... §4 [Cleave]
trvirtuoso.ultimate.domain.soul: §9 You feel the astral body of every life form within your domain... §b[Soul Dismantle]
